chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 07 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 339/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025. Mr. Abdul Bari Panhwar, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi, Advocate for respondent. = Statement filed by the counsel for appellant alongwith case law, taken on record. For reasons to be recorded, the 1st Appeal is dismissed alongwith pending application. JUDGE Tufail
